Package
Description
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.program.ast
The parser and ASTs of programs.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.program.itree
Itree (intermediate tree) representation of Kink programs.

    Description
    BindingExpr
    A context binding expression.
    DerefExpr
    A var deref expression.
    Elem
    An elem of vec bodies or actual args.
    Expr
    An expression node of an AST of Kink program.
    ExprVisitor
    A visitor of an expression.
    FunExpr
    A fun expression.
    McallExpr
    An attributional call expression without an explicit recv.
    NumExpr
    A num expression.
    RcallExpr
    An attributional call expression with an explicit recv.
    SeqExpr
    A seq.
    StrExpr
    A str expression.
    VarrefExpr
    A varref expression.
    VecExpr
    A vec expression.
